description_blurb: This is an excerpt from the complete transcript of the Gemini VII mission, highlighting the segment in which Astronaut Frank Borman reports seeing an unidentified object. It includes identification of the NASA recording number, and hand written notes documenting which portions of the mission audio appear on the accompanying recording.
title: 255_t_763_r1b_transcripts
summary: An excerpt from the Gemini VII mission transcript, highlighting the segment where Astronaut Frank Borman reports seeing an unidentified object, referred to as a "bogey," at "ten o'clock high." Astronauts Borman and Jim Lovell also observe numerous small particles, described as "hundreds" or "millions," and the booster, which is seen "slowly tumbling" and as a "brilliant body." The particles are reported to be going into a polar orbit.
reported_object_description: A "bogey" at ten o'clock high; "hundreds of little particles" / "millions of particles"; a "brilliant body" (booster).
reported_behavior: The "bogey" was at "ten o'clock high." Particles were "going by to the left" and "going into polar orbit." The booster was "slowly tumbling."
bust_reasoning: The document describes a 'bogey' observed by astronauts Borman and Lovell, explicitly stated to be an 'unidentified object' and distinct from both the booster and the 'hundreds of little particles' (debris). While the witnesses are highly credible, the 'bogey' is only described by its relative position ('ten o'clock high') without any detailed kinematics or anomalous behavior that would resist a mundane explanation. The document itself does not provide a specific prosaic identification for this 'bogey,' placing it in the 'genuinely uncertain' category. The lack of multi-sensor data or highly anomalous behavior prevents a lower score, but its explicit 'unidentified' status by trained observers prevents a higher one.
full_text:
# 255_t_763_r1b_transcripts - Page 1

TAPE No. T-00763(R1b)

"P.A.O. RELEASE COMMENTARY OF THE GT-7/6 FLIGHT."

P.A.O. SINCE THEN WE HAVE DUBBED THE TAPE OFF. THE MASTER TAPE HERE IN THE CONTRO CENTER AND WE ARE NOW PREPARED TO PLAY IT FOR YOU - IT CONTAINS REFERENCES TO SIGHTING NOT ONLY SOME PARTICLES BUT AS WELL AS AN UNIDENTIFIED OBJECT PLUS THE BOOSTER HERS THAT TAPE WE'LL PLAY IT FOR YOU NOW----

S/C GEMINI-7 HERE HOUSTON-- HOW DO YOU READ?
HOUSTON: LOUD AND CLEAR SEVEN - GO AHEAD.
S/C (BORMAN) A BOGEY AT TEN O'CLOCK HIGH.
HOUSTON THIS IS HOUSTON, SAY AGAIN SEVEN?
S/C (BORMAN) I SAID WE HAVE A BOGEY AT TEN O'CLOCK HIGH.
HOUSTON ROGER. GEMINI-7 ISTHAT THE BOOSTER OR IS THAT A NATURAL SIGHTING?
S/C A WHAT?
HOUSTON SAY AGAIN SEVEN.
S/C (BORMAN) WE HAVE DEBRIS UP HERE - THIS IS AN ACTUAL SIGHTING.
HOUSTON YOU HAVE ANY MORE INFORMATION - ESTIMATE DISTANCE OR SIZE?
S/C (BORMAN) WE ALSO HAVE THE BOOSTER IN SIGHT.
HOUSTON UNDERSTAND YOU ALSO HAVE THE BOOSTER IN SIGHT. ROGER.
S/C (BORMAN) WE HAVE VERY, VERY MANY A - IT LOOKS LIKE HUNDREDS OF LITTLE PARTICLES GOING BY TO THE LEFT OUT ABOUT THREE OR FOUR MILES.
HOUSTON UNDERSTAND YOU HAVE MANY SMALL PARTICLES GOING BY ON THE LEFT AT WHAT DISTANCE?
S/C (BORMAN) ....GARBLED ... FOUR MILES. OH, ABOUT - GARBLED - IT LOOKS LIKE A PATH OF THE VEHICLE AT 90 DEGREES.
HOUSTON ROGER. UNDERSTAND THEY'RE ABOUT THREE OR FOUR MILES AWAY
S/C (BORMAN) THEY'VE PASSED NOW. THEY'RE GOING INTO POLAR ORBIT.
HOUSTON ROGER. UNDERSTAND THEY WERE THREE TO FOUR MILES AWAY.
S/C THATS WHAT IT APPEARED LIKE. THATS ROGER.
HOUSTON GEMINI-7 - HOUSTON - WERE THESE PARTICLES IN ADDITION TO THE BOOSTER AND THE BOGEY AT TEN O'CLOCK HIGH?
S/C (LOVELL) ROGER. I HAVE THE BOOSTER ON MY SIDE. ITS A BRILLIANT BODY IN THE SUN AGAINST A BLACK BACKGROUND WITH TRILLIONS OF PARTICLES ON IT.
HOUSTON ROGER WHAT DIRECTION IS IT FROM YOU?
S/C (LOVELL) ITS ABOUT AT MY TWO O'CLOCK POSITION.
HOUSTON DOES THAT MEAN ITS AHEAD OF YOU?
S/C (LOVELL) ITS AHEAD OF US AT TWO O'CLOCK, SLOWLY TUMBLING
HOUSTON ROGER.
.......... LONG PAUSE......... DUAL TRANSMISSION........
P.A.O. THIS IS GEMINI CONTROL AGAIN THE REFERENCE IN THAT CONVERSATION TO THE THIRD AND UNIDENTIFIED OBJECT OF COURSE WAS OR THE THIRD OBJECT WAS A [redacted] BOGEY. THERE WERE SEVERAL REFERENCES TO THE BOGEY. AT 4 Hrs 24 MIN INTO THE FLIGHT THIS IS GEMINI CONTROL.

- 1 -



# 255_t_763_r1b_transcripts - Page 2

T-00763 (R1B)

"UFO SIGHTING BY BORMAN" (GT-7)

Since then we have dubbed the tape off
the master tape here in the Control Center and we
are now prepared to play it for you. It contains
references to sighting not only some particles but
as well as an unidentified object and plus the booster
here is that tape we'll play it for you now -

S/C :- Gemini 7 here Houston - how do you read?
Houston :- loud & clear 7 go ahead.
S/C :- a bogey at 10 o'clock high (Borman)
Houston :- this is Houston say again seven?
S/C :- Borman I said we have a bogey at 10 o'clock high.
Houston :- Roger. Gemini 7 is that the booster or is that
a natural sighting?
S/C :- a what?
Houston :- Say again seven.
S/C :- Borman we have debris up here - this is an actual sighting
Houston :- you have anymore information? Estimate
distance or size?
S/C :- Borman We also have the booster in sight.
Houston :- Understand you also have the booster in sight. roger,
S/C :- Borman We have [redacted] [redacted] a it looks like hundreds of
a going little a particles going by to the left out about
3 to 4 miles
Houston :- understand you have many small particles going



# 255_t_763_r1b_transcripts - Page 3

Houston:
bogey on the left at what distance?

S/C:- Bowman
- garbled - 4 miles. It looks like a [crossed out: round] vehicle [crossed out: faulty] painted on about - garbled -
it looks like a path of the vehicle at 90 degrees
Houston:- Roger. understand they're about 3 to 4 miles away
S/C:- Bowman they passed now - they're going into polar orbit
Houston:- Roger understand they were 3-4 miles away.
S/C:- that's what it appeared like. that's roger.
Houston:- Gemini-7- Houston - were these particles in
addition to the booster and the bogey at 10 o'clock high
[crossed out text]

S/C:- (Lovell):- Roger. I have the booster myself
it's a brilliant body in the sun against a black
background with millions of particles on it.
Houston:- roger what direction is it from you.
S/C:- (Lovell) it's about at my 2 o'clock position.
Houston:- does that mean that it's ahead of you?
S/C:- (Lovell) it's ahead of us at 2 o'clock slowly [crossed out: tumbling]
Houston- roger.
[long pause - two garbled transmissions] tumbling
[crossed out: Gemini Control] PAO: Gemini Control here again the reference
in that conversation to the third and unidentified
object of course - was [arrow pointing to 'the'] the third object was
a bogey



# 255_t_763_r1b_transcripts - Page 4

PAO! - there were several references to the bogey
this is the unidentified object in addition to
the particles which appeared to be headed in a
polar orbit you heard Frank Borman
say plus Jim Lovell describe discussing
the booster it was Borman who reported
sighting the bogey - this is Gemini Control in
Houston at [illegible] 24 min into the flight.

time:- 05 min: 34 sec.
cover_up_reasoning: The document is a 'P.A.O. RELEASE COMMENTARY' and openly discusses the 'unidentified object' (bogey) to the public. The few instances of '[redacted]' text are minimal, appear to be single words or garbled speech, and do not seem to conceal critical information about the observation itself. There are no references to classified annexes, witness intimidation, or contradictions with public statements.
summary_zh: 双子座七号任务记录的摘录，重点介绍了宇航员弗兰克·博尔曼报告看到一个不明物体，被称为“不明飞行物”（bogey），位于“十点钟高位”。宇航员博尔曼和吉姆·洛弗尔还观察到大量小颗粒，被描述为“数百个”或“数百万个”，以及助推器，该助推器被看到“缓慢翻滚”并呈“明亮物体”状。据报告，这些颗粒正在进入极地轨道。
reported_object_description_zh: 一个位于“十点钟高位”的“不明飞行物”（bogey）；“数百个小颗粒”/“数百万个颗粒”；一个“明亮物体”（助推器）。
reported_behavior_zh: 该“不明飞行物”（bogey）位于“十点钟高位”。颗粒“从左侧经过”并“进入极地轨道”。助推器“缓慢翻滚”。
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件描述了宇航员博尔曼和洛弗尔观察到的一个“不明飞行物”（bogey），明确指出其为“不明物体”，且与助推器和“数百个小颗粒”（碎片）均不同。尽管目击者高度可信，但该“不明飞行物”仅通过其相对位置（“十点钟高位”）进行描述，缺乏详细的运动学特征或异常行为，无法排除普通解释。文件本身并未对该“不明飞行物”提供具体的世俗解释，将其归类为“确实不确定”。缺乏多传感器数据或高度异常行为使其无法获得较低评分，但受过训练的观察员明确将其列为“未识别”则阻止了较高评分。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 该文件是一份“公共事务办公室发布评论”，并向公众公开讨论了“不明物体”（bogey）。少数几处“[已编辑]”文本极少，似乎是单个词语或含糊不清的言语，并未隐藏关于观测本身的任何关键信息。没有提及机密附件、恐吓目击者或与公开声明相矛盾之处。
claims: Astronaut Frank Borman sighted an unidentified object, a "bogey."
Astronauts Borman and Lovell observed numerous small particles.
The particles were estimated to be 3-4 miles away and going into polar orbit.
The booster was also in sight, described as a "brilliant body" and "slowly tumbling."
claims_zh: 宇航员弗兰克·博尔曼目击到一个不明物体，即一个“不明飞行物”（bogey）。
宇航员博尔曼和洛弗尔观察到大量小颗粒。
这些颗粒估计距离3-4英里，并正在进入极地轨道。
助推器也在视野内，被描述为“明亮物体”并“缓慢翻滚”。
bust_explanations: Another piece of space debris: Given the presence of the booster and 'hundreds of little particles' (debris) already observed, the 'bogey' could be a larger, distinct piece of orbital debris from the same or another source, not explicitly identified as such in the transcript.
Another known or unknown satellite: While less likely to be termed a 'bogey' if it were a known, tracked satellite, it remains a possibility for an unidentified object in Low Earth Orbit in 1965.

Ice or condensation from the spacecraft: Although the 'particles' are mentioned separately, a larger piece of ice or condensation could potentially appear as a distinct 'bogey' at a distance, though 'ten o'clock high' suggests it's not immediately adjacent.
bust_explanations_zh: 另一块太空碎片：考虑到已观测到助推器和“数百个小颗粒”（碎片），该“不明飞行物”（bogey）可能是一块来自相同或不同来源的更大、独立的轨道碎片，但记录中并未明确指出。
另一颗已知或未知卫星：如果它是一颗已知且被追踪的卫星，则不太可能被称为“不明飞行物”（bogey），但对于1965年近地轨道上的不明物体而言，这仍是一种可能性。
航天器上的冰或冷凝物：尽管“颗粒”是单独提及的，但一块较大的冰或冷凝物在远处可能表现为一个独立的“不明飞行物”（bogey），尽管“十点钟高位”表明它并非紧邻航天器。
cover_up_indicators: Page 1: 'the third object was a [redacted] BOGEY.'
Page 2: 'We have [redacted] [redacted] a it looks like hundreds of a going little a particles'
cover_up_indicators_zh: 第1页：“第三个物体是一个[已编辑]不明飞行物（BOGEY）。”
第2页：“我们有[已编辑][已编辑]看起来像数百个正在移动的小颗粒”
